query:
INSERT INTO conferences (title, description, type, platform, host_user_id, host_name, room_code, scheduled_at, duration_minutes, max_attendees, status, recording_enabled, captions_enabled, actual_attendees, recording_status, source, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('UN CSW70 Strategy Session', 'Private strategy and planning session for the UN CSW70 delegation. Coordinate presentations, review talking points, and align team messaging before the main event.', 'meeting', 'jitsi', 1, 'Valanna', 'RRB-CSW70-STRATEGY', NULL, 120, 50, 'live', 1, 1, 0, 'none', 'qumus', NOW(), NOW());
